pr.title: feat: Complete frontend implementation — 40+ pages, all Phase 0-10 UI
pr.body: ## Summary Complete React/TypeScript frontend implementation for the CCC contact center platform, covering all Phase 0-10 functionality with 40+ page routes. **Tech Stack:** Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Ant Design 5 + Zustand + Axios + React Router **Architecture:** - `src/api/client.ts` — Axios instance with JWT interceptors (auto 401→login redirect) - `src/api/endpoints.ts` — 170+ backend API endpoint wrappers organized by bounded context - `src/stores/auth.ts` — Zustand auth store with localStorage persistence - `src/components/common/CrudPage.tsx` — Reusable CRUD component (table + modal + search + delete confirmation) - `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx` — Collapsible sidebar nav + header dropdown **Pages (62 files, +9575 lines):** | Category | Pages | |---|---| | Auth | Login (JWT) | | Dashboard | Real-time overview (18 metrics, agent status table, call funnel) | | Agent Mgmt | Agent list, Skill groups (with member management) | | IVR | Flow list (publish/lock/clone/rollback/versions), DAG editor (20 node types) | | Telephony | Phone numbers, Call records (filters/detail drawer/IVR tracking/recording player), Voicemails | | Campaigns | CRUD (4 dialing modes), case import, live statistics modal | | IM | Session management (chat UI with message list), Channel configuration | | CRM | Customer list/CRUD/batch import | | Tickets | Ticket list/detail/comments, Templates (draft→published) | | Knowledge | Categories + Articles (full-text search) | | Reports | Agent, Group agent, Skill group, B2B, Internal call, Status log (all with date filters + CSV export) | | AI | Digital employees/scenes, QA (rules/schemes/results/appeals/review), ASR hotwords, Performance scorecards, Annotations (task lifecycle), LLM gateway | | Settings | Tenant, Break reasons, Disposition codes, Business hours, Custom fields, Call tags, Screen pop, Webhooks, SMS config, Quick replies, CSAT config, Audio files | | Platform | Tenant management (CRUD), Audit logs | | My Workbench | Overview stats, profile, password change, state reset | **Build verification:** - `tsc --noEmit` — zero TypeScript errors - `vite build` — production build passes (1.47MB bundle) ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] Run `cd web && npm install && npm run build` — verify zero errors - [ ] Run `npm run dev` — verify dev server starts, navigate to `/login` - [ ] Verify sidebar navigation covers all expected modules per v5.2 spec - [ ] Verify API endpoint wrappers in `src/api/endpoints.ts` match the Go backend handler routes - [ ] Test login flow with the Go backend running — JWT token stored, redirects to dashboard - [ ] Spot-check 3-5 CRUD pages (e.g., agents, skill groups, call records) — create/edit/delete modals work **Recommended test plan:** 1. Start Go backend: `go run cmd/server/main.go` 2. Start frontend: `cd web && npm run dev` 3. Login → Dashboard → navigate all sidebar items → verify pages load without console errors 4. Test one full CRUD flow (e.g., create agent → edit → delete) ### Notes - The IVR editor is a simplified DAG editor (list-based with node config panels). A full canvas drag-drop editor (e.g., with React Flow) can be added as a future enhancement. - Bundle is 1.47MB (uncompressed) / 452KB gzipped — code splitting can be added later via dynamic imports. - All pages gracefully handle API errors (catch blocks) since the backend may not be running during frontend development. Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/35e328fa681447e98fa82466c8f69b99 Requested by: @divord97 ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
